name: 2X4 LED Troffer Light Wattage 25/30/35/40/50W 3CCT
description: Delivering outstanding performance and adaptability, The ZION LED USA 2x4ft LED Troffer Light is designed to meet the diverse lighting needs of commercial and institutional spaces. With selectable wattages (25/30/35/40/50W) and adjustable color temperatures (3500K–6500K), this fixture offers the flexibility to tailor both brightness and ambiance. Its ETL and DLC Premium certifications ensure energy efficiency, quality, and rebate eligibility—making it a smart upgrade for modern facilities. Whether you’re upgrading from outdated fluorescent systems or designing a new energy-efficient lighting plan, The ZION LED USA 2x4ft LED Troffer Light offers superior adaptability, performance, and control. With selectable wattage and CCT, plus dimming and smart-sensor compatibility, it’s the ideal lighting solution for today’s dynamic commercial environments.
short_desc: Key Features: Selectable Wattage: Easily switch between 25W, 30W, 35W, 40W, or 50W to suit specific lighting requirements and maximize energy savings. Adjustable Color Temperature (CCT): Choose from 3500K (warm white) to 6500K (cool daylight) for optimal lighting tone based on the environment. Wide Voltage Range: Operates on 100-277VAC, offering compatibility with most commercial electrical systems. 0-10V Dimming: Supports smooth, flicker-free dimming for dynamic light control and energy efficiency. Certifications: ETL listed and DLC Premium certified for top-tier performance, safety, and utility rebate qualification. Optional Add-ons: Compatible with emergency battery backups and motion sensors to enhance safety and energy management. Ideal Applications: Offices & Conference Rooms: Delivers consistent, comfortable lighting that boosts productivity and visual comfort. Educational Facilities: Provides uniform illumination that supports focus and learning. Healthcare Settings: Bright, glare-free light ideal for hospitals and clinics. Retail & Commercial Spaces: Enhances visibility and ambiance while maintaining energy efficiency.
